g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Task 1 do in the HCM air quality pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is the GCS bronze layer in the HCM pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What PySpark transformations does Task 2 perform?')
sendPrompt('What is the GCS silver layer in the HCM pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does Task 3 load silver data from GCS to BigQuery?')
sendPrompt('How is raw_air_quality partitioned and clustered in BigQuery?')
sendPrompt('What are the 3 dbt model layers in the HCM air quality pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What BigQuery mart tables does dbt produce for the dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What are the 2 Looker Studio dashboard tiles for the HCM air quality project?')
